headline: Clear Aligner Market Report: 2026 Edition Now Available
summary: The global clear aligner market, valued at $6.80 billion in 2024, is set to reach $24.07 billion by 2030, driven by growing awareness of dental health and aesthetics. With a projected CAGR of 23% from 2025 to 2030, the rise in malocclusion cases, technological advancements, and beauty standards are key growth drivers. Notably, North America leads the market due to advanced dental infrastructure. The market segments include procedure types (Doctor-Directed and Direct-to-Consumer), age groups, and
